2402010.name: Have Fun, Don't Die!
2402010.description:
Have Fun, Don't Die! -  is an adrenaline-fueled multiplayer VR shooter that puts you in the role of both warrior and weaponsmith.

Design and build your own arsenal from the ground up by hand-placing 3D pixel blocks—each with unique properties that shape your weapon’s look, feel, and performance.

Outsmart your rivals with wild, unconventional creations or command respect with sleek, finely tuned masterpieces of destruction. Every battle is an opportunity to experiment, innovate, and perfect your personal combat style.

Game Features:

1. Custom Weapon Crafting: No more generic guns—build your destiny, one block at a time! Each piece changes how your weapon looks, feels, and fights. Experiment endlessly and craft a weapon that’s truly you.

2. Character Customization: Express yourself and stand out on the battlefield! Create your own unique avatar with an extensive range of outfits, accessories, and body customization options. Whether you’re aiming for style, intimidation, or pure chaos, your look will be as unforgettable as your gameplay.

3. Choose Your Style:
Find your rhythm on the battlefield with two core weapon classes: pistols and SMGs. Will you master precision and control as a deadly sharpshooter, or dominate the arena with a blazing-fast custom SMG? The choice is yours—your style, your rules.

4. Dynamic Multiplayer:
Jump into intense, fast-paced multiplayer battles with friends and players from around the world! Test your skills in tactical team clashes or dive headfirst into chaotic free-for-all showdowns. Victory demands sharp aim, clever tactics, and flawless teamwork.

5. Block Variety:
Experiment with a vast selection of blocks, each bringing unique attributes to your creations. Mix and match to fine-tune stats like damage, accuracy, recoil, and more. Every combination opens new tactical possibilities—no two weapons (or fights) are ever the same.

6. Strategy Meets Action:
Have Fun, Don't Die! - redefines the shooter experience by blending creativity, strategy, and high-octane combat. Plan your loadout, build your weapon, and adapt to every encounter. Outsmart, outbuild, and outplay your opponents—your ingenuity is the ultimate weapon.
2402010.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
